name: Trifecta Signal with Liquidity Filter
hypothesis: The strong predictive power of combined order book imbalance and price momentum is most reliable in liquid, low-spread market conditions. Adding a spread filter will improve precision by removing signals from uncertain, wide-spread regimes.
mutation_note: Per feedback `add_filter`, added a spread-based liquidity filter (`spread_bps < 15`) to the high-performing momentum ensemble to test its robustness and potentially increase precision.
